lstmModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
  (encoder_linear): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=64, bias=True)
  (lstm): LSTM(64, 64, batch_first=True)
  (decoder_linear): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=4, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
)
Epoch 1/2000, Loss: 0.6482488859072327

  (linear1): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
  (encoder_linear): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=64, bias=True)

)

  (linear1): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
  (encoder_linear): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=32, bias=True)
  (lstm): LSTM(32, 32, batch_first=True)
  (decoder_linear): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=4, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)

lstmModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
  (encoder_linear): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=32, bias=True)
  (lstm): LSTM(32, 32, batch_first=True)
  (decoder_linear): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=4, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
)

  (encoder_linear): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=32, bias=True)
